message:
refactor: Convert 10 more module handlers to comptime pattern

Convert _lsprof, _lzma, _markupbase, _md5, _msi, _multibytecodec,
_multiprocessing, _opcode, _osx_support, _overlapped modules from
runtime to comptime genConst pattern.
